name: L1 - Abertura de Projeto Tecnico Setup

parameters.jsCode: const out = []; const items = $input.all(); const setups = $('Prepare Setup Payload').all(); items.forEach((item, i) => { const projectPageId = item.json.id; const setup = setups[i].json; for (const check of setup.checks) { out.push({ json: { checklistPayload: { parent: { database_id: '19fb65e5-c72b-8171-b535-000b978f7811' }, properties: { Nome: { title: [{ text: { content: check.itemName } }] }, Projeto: { relation: [{ id: projectPageId }] }, 'Criado por': { select: { name: 'n8n' } }, 'Concluído?': { checkbox: check.filled } } } }, pairedItem: { item: i } }); } }); return out;

const out = []; const inputs = $input.all(); const setups = $('Prepare Setup Payload').all(); inputs.forEach((inp, i) => { const setup = setups[i].json; if (!setup.missing || setup.missing.length === 0) return; out.push({ json: { projectPageId: inp.json.id, missing: setup.missing, telegramText: setup.telegramText }, pairedItem: { item: i } }); }); return out;

const out = []; const inputs = $input.all(); const setups = $('Prepare Setup Payload').all(); inputs.forEach((inp, i) => { const setup = setups[i].json; if (setup.missing && setup.missing.length > 0) return; const timestamp = new Date().toISOString(); out.push({ json: { projectPageId: inp.json.id, logPayload: { children: [{ object: 'block', type: 'callout', callout: { icon: { type: 'emoji', emoji: '✅' }, rich_text: [{ type: 'text', text: { content: `Sem alerta (nada faltando) -- ${timestamp}` } }], color: 'green_background' } }] } }, pairedItem: { item: i } }); }); return out;
